'''dhodhadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keepless|keepless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keepless|keepless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhodhadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodhadithi|dhodhadithi]] || [[word:dhodhadiji|dhodhadiji]] || [[word:dhodhadishi|dhodhadishi]] || [[word:dhodhadiki|dhodhadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodhaduthuthu|dhodhaduthuthu]] || [[word:dhodhadujuju|dhodhadujuju]] || [[word:dhodhadushushu|dhodhadushushu]] || [[word:dhodhadukuku|dhodhadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodhaduthu|dhodhaduthu]] || [[word:dhodhaduju|dhodhaduju]] || [[word:dhodhadushu|dhodhadushu]] || [[word:dhodhaduku|dhodhaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodhadufthuf|dhodhadufthuf]] || [[word:dhodhadufjuf|dhodhadufjuf]] || [[word:dhodhadufshuf|dhodhadufshuf]] || [[word:dhodhadufkuf|dhodhadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodhadethe|dhodhadethe]] || [[word:dhodhadeje|dhodhadeje]] || [[word:dhodhadeshe|dhodhadeshe]] || [[word:dhodhadeke|dhodhadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodhadothotho|dhodhadothotho]] || [[word:dhodhadojojo|dhodhadojojo]] || [[word:dhodhadoshosho|dhodhadoshosho]] || [[word:dhodhadokoko|dhodhadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodhadotho|dhodhadotho]] || [[word:dhodhadojo|dhodhadojo]] || [[word:dhodhadosho|dhodhadosho]] || [[word:dhodhadoko|dhodhadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodhadofthof|dhodhadofthof]] || [[word:dhodhadofjof|dhodhadofjof]] || [[word:dhodhadofshof|dhodhadofshof]] || [[word:dhodhadofkof|dhodhadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodhadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŠthĂŠ|dhodhadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŠjĂŠ|dhodhadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŠshĂŠ|dhodhadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodhadĂŠkĂŠ|dhodhadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodhadathatha|dhodhadathatha]] || [[word:dhodhadajaja|dhodhadajaja]] || [[word:dhodhadashasha|dhodhadashasha]] || [[word:dhodhadakaka|dhodhadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodhadatha|dhodhadatha]] || [[word:dhodhadaja|dhodhadaja]] || [[word:dhodhadasha|dhodhadasha]] || [[word:dhodhadaka|dhodhadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodhadafthaf|dhodhadafthaf]] || [[word:dhodhadafjaf|dhodhadafjaf]] || [[word:dhodhadafshaf|dhodhadafshaf]] || [[word:dhodhadafkaf|dhodhadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhodhadasha|dhodhadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodhadshĂ«sha|dhodhadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodhadrosha|dhodhadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodhadmusha|dhodhadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodhadyasha|dhodhadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodhadnkshĂ«sha|godhodhadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodhadnkrosha|godhodhadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodhadnkmusha|godhodhadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodhadnkyasha|godhodhadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhodhadhadasha|dhodhadhadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodhadhadshĂ«sha|dhodhadhadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodhadhadrosha|dhodhadhadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodhadhadmusha|dhodhadhadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodhadhadyasha|dhodhadhadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodhadhadnkshĂ«sha|godhodhadhadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodhadhadnkrosha|godhodhadhadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodhadhadnkmusha|godhodhadhadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodhadhadnkyasha|godhodhadhadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhedhĂŠdasha|dhedhĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhedhĂŠdshĂ«sha|dhedhĂŠdshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhedhĂŠdrosha|dhedhĂŠdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhedhĂŠdmusha|dhedhĂŠdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhedhĂŠdyasha|dhedhĂŠdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhedhĂŠdnkshĂ«sha|godhedhĂŠdnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhedhĂŠdnkrosha|godhedhĂŠdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhedhĂŠdnkmusha|godhedhĂŠdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhedhĂŠdnkyasha|godhedhĂŠdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhodhfadasha|dhodhfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodhfadshĂ«sha|dhodhfadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodhfadrosha|dhodhfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodhfadmusha|dhodhfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodhfadyasha|dhodhfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodhfadnkshĂ«sha|godhodhfadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodhfadnkrosha|godhodhfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodhfadnkmusha|godhodhfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodhfadnkyasha|godhodhfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
